properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Go, ahead, drive the nails in my hand, Laugh at me, where you stand, Go ahead, and say it isn’t me, The day will come, when you will see.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cause I’ll rise again, Ain’t no power on earth can tie me down; Yes, I’ll rise again, Death can’t keep me in the ground.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Go ahead, and mock my name, My love for you is still the same; Go ahead, and bury me, But very soon, I will be free.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Go ahead, and say I’m dead and gone, But you will see that you were wrong; Go ahead, try to hide the Son, But all will see, that I’m the One.
